text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Neither Mayano nor Akebono have arrived yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They haven't retired from the race either... I wonder if something
happened to them.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Wait... Don't tell me you used the slide on—

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Non non! I certainly did not, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Right now, those two are discovering their own beauty... It's nothing
more than that. ♪
Several hours earlier...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Air Groove's stopped chasing after me, so I must really be in the lead!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Once I get my very own wedding dress, everyone's gonna swoon over
me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Handsome Guy
text_block_list.text: What beauty! I've never seen such a captivating Umamusume before!

text_block_list.name: Sexy Lady
text_block_list.text: Such beauty, such grace... I wish I could be like yooouuu! ♪

text_block_list.name: Popular Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! No one has more mature charm than Mayano Top Gun, that's
for sure!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ooh! I'm such a catch! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Just kidding! I'd better hurry to the goal if I want to make my dream
come true!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eek! What's with the suspension bridge?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: If I were to fall from this height, I'd be in a world of pain...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But I have to cross it! I've gotta be brave and charming like real,
grown-up women are!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hup! Hah!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. ♪ This is kinda fun now that I've gotten used to it! It's just like
an obstacle course!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: All right! Time to take off and soar all the way to the chapel! ☆
...YAAA!
MAYAAA!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? That voice... Bono?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I thought I heard her voice, but I don't see her... Bono! Where are
you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Down here! Below the bridge!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Below? Wait, are you on the cliff?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ow, ow, ow. Thank goodness you noticed me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh no, Bono! What are you doing down there?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I slipped and twisted my ankle... I was sure I'd be able to just climb
right back up, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Maya, when you get to the chapel, could you get them to send a
medical team over?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? But if I do that you'll—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I'll have to retire from the race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But there's no way around it. I can't possibly reach the goal like this.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Ring-a-ding-dong. ☆ I have a halftime announcement for my beautiful
gemstones out there. ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
At present, Mayano Top Gun is closest to the finish line, with Air
Groove following close behind!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're all going to make a très bien effort not to lose to the
two of them! Adieu. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm in the lead...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: That's amazing, Maya! At this rate, you'll be made a muse for sure!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So... you can't stop now, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But, but... Bono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Don't worry about me. I'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But I'll be extra buono if you become a muse for the two of us. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(If I reach the chapel first, Ms. Beauty will definitely acknowledge me.
I'll be able to wear a wedding dress and get closer to becoming a real
lady.)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: (But Bono's aiming for the same thing...)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: (I bet she wants to become a muse and wear a wedding dress too...)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You two sure are fired up for this. I'll have to give it my all
too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It would be so buono if we could all run in wedding dresses
together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: (Ohhh! I don't know what to do!)
